description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its length. The grooves are deep and create a ribbed texture, likely intended to provide traction or drainage. The block is solid and has a dark, mottled stone appearance, suggesting it is made from granite or a similar durable material. The sides are smooth and unadorned, with a consistent dark coloration. The overall form is robust and utilitarian, suitable for use as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments. There are no visible signs of damage, markings, or engravings on its surfaces.
description: A dark, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface, giving it a ribbed and sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the block's flat face and the horizontal grooves running across the top surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and spacing of the vertical grooves, making the ribbed texture more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the flat face and horizontal grooves on the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the vertical grooves and the block's thickness.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or roadside as a barrier or divider
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set on a prepared base
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no signs of erosion or moss.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
